issues.title: 29% of the frame is empty while the top band is crowded
issues.rationale: unused space alone is not a defect; the UX-02 and UX-14 fixes already borrowed the capacity they needed

issues.title: role: value is not localized
issues.rationale: one-line localization fix, but not worth re-baselining the stable offline state before the device run

issues.title: Absence is encoded three different ways
issues.rationale: distinguishing absent vs unknown vs downstream needs a reviewed token-family split in the schema-/3 palette

issues.title: Workspace and Audit Room Flat disagree on what verified looks like
issues.rationale: choosing one colour grammar for both surfaces is a design decision; the Flat grammar is the documented, test-pinned one

issues.title: No focus / selected / hover / disabled model exists
issues.rationale: controller affordance design needs real controller-in-hand evidence; it is the SUBJECT of physical validation, not a blocker of it

issues.title: Capture harness pollutes the shared PlayMode session + PNG non-byte-determinism
issues.rationale: fully mitigated operationally by fresh-process discipline (proven by two identical 101/99/0/2 full runs); PNG nondeterminism does not block human evidence
